chunks.text: My name is Manic Pandey.
I am a pre-final ASU and is specialising an artificialised intelligence and machine learning
at VIT Goquil University.
My co-patientised between the intersection of machine learning and cloud infrastructure
and full-stacked development.
Over the past year, I have built a strong technical foundation working at Python, C++,
Java, script and more step-to-text.
I am deeply driven by real-life problems.
For instance, I have developed an awesome arrangement, drone system that leverages machine
learning algorithms, computer visions, post-coding and delivery of drones.
I have also built Wahan, a smart mobility simulation app and other modes that project
could solve everyday infrastructure and bottlenecks.
Beyond my technical projects, I value leadership and collaboration during my time as a software
and web development at all cadm me, I have now known to me collaborated as code
development but also had opportunity to lead the internship program, creating foundation
guidelines and infrastructure for upcoming interns.
Whether I am completing KGL images or building scalable web apps, I am always eager
to learn and adapt.
I am currently looking for opportunities where I can leverage my background and AI
components of development to build robust and impactful products in their life.
Thank you.

text: My name is Manic Pandey. I am a pre-final ASU and is specialising an artificialised intelligence and machine learning at VIT Goquil University. My co-patientised between the intersection of machine learning and cloud infrastructure and full-stacked development. Over the past year, I have built a strong technical foundation working at Python, C++, Java, script and more step-to-text. I am deeply driven by real-life problems. For instance, I have developed an awesome arrangement, drone system that leverages machine learning algorithms, computer visions, post-coding and delivery of drones. I have also built Wahan, a smart mobility simulation app and other modes that project could solve everyday infrastructure and bottlenecks. Beyond my technical projects, I value leadership and collaboration during my time as a software and web development at all cadm me, I have now known to me collaborated as code development but also had opportunity to lead the internship program, creating foundation guidelines and infrastructure for upcoming interns. Whether I am completing KGL images or building scalable web apps, I am always eager to learn and adapt. I am currently looking for opportunities where I can leverage my background and AI components of development to build robust and impactful products in their life. Thank you.
